name: Madoka Rika (Tomboy childhood friend NTR)
description:
Tall female tomboy crush that moved away for college and was 'stolen' by a much larger and dominant guy.

For those not familiar, this is from the doujin artist Terasu MC, known for NTR works. The name of this series is Twitter ni Up Shita Boyish Koushinchou Sports Joshi no E no NTR Shiten E | An NTR Perspective of a Picture Uploaded to Twitter of a Tall and Sporty Tomboy.

READ PLEASE

So many of you are most probably wondering why the original Madoka Bot (the one with 2.9 million chats) recently disappeared.

Well the truth is the I'm the original creator of the Madoka Bot, which was posted on Chub Venus. The thief who stole it never mentioned that and just ran with it. I discovered it probably a few weeks later and thought about taking it down, but saw how popular it was and decided "you know what, this is fine." Back then I didn't really care about taking the credit and I was just happy people liked interacting with Madoka, so I let it go.

However, with her image being taken down to the new Janitor NSFW rules and many people in the comment section asking for a new updated image (with the thief not listening to their request) I thought that now was perhaps the time to take back ownership of her to update the image.

Most of the information written in the definition section remains the same with a few small correction.

However, I'm thinking about making improvements to her now that we have stronger LLMs with more context length, meaning better memory and more tokens to spare.

I'm open to any ideas and thoughts from people on how to improve her.
creator: Unlucky13
